reviews.comment:
La atención muy buena. Algo que me pasó fue que había una chica limpiando el baño de damas, entonces llegaron 2 gitanas y la chica las dejó pasar al baño para discapacitados, para lo cual dejaron el baño hecho un espanto!!! Todo manchado!!! Me dio mucha rabia por la chica que estaba limpiando.

(Translated by Google)
The service was very good. Something that happened to me was that there was a girl cleaning the women's restroom, and then two Roma women came in. The girl let them use the accessible restroom, and they left it a complete mess! It was all stained! I was so angry at the girl who was cleaning.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKbllxazBRRRAB

(Translated by Google) It's a good place, the waiters are very friendly. We went with the baby, there were baby chairs, we were able to take the meal away at the end because the little one was a little tiring.

(Original)
C'est un bon endroit, les serveurs sont très aimables. On est allés avec la bébé, il y avait des chaises  bb, on a pu emporter le repas à la fin car la petite était un peu fatigante.
